bugs.title: Failed to process rescheduling request
bugs.evidence: I can't help with rescheduling right now, but I can connect you to our patient support team for help.
bugs.why_it_matters: The agent should have helped the user reschedule the appointment instead of transferring to a support team.
bugs.recommendation: Ensure the AI is capable of handling rescheduling directly without transferring to other representatives.

overall_notes: The agent was unable to assist with the rescheduling task, failing to confirm the original appointment and address the user's intent effectively.
